metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Wait for a duration, firing a child cursor at regular (or randomized) intervals

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Called when timer reaches the duration OR is stopped. NOTE: This will run a little while AFTER the last interval fires unless they line up perfectly.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: New child cursor starts here every time the wait interval elapses

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Generate a random integer between min and max (inclusive)

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: If set, we will populate a snapshot from the surface graph

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Waits for the entity to fire a specific output. By default, this listens once, but can be configured to listen until canceled.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Optional output value to match if applicable. Leave empty to match any possible value for the output param.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Continue listening for the output until canceled.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: All values connected to this node must be 'observable'. Variables on this graph will be automatically promoted to observable. Other value nodes must take an explicit context, look for those nodes with a corresponding icon.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Condition to evaluate when any of its dependent values change.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Causes this execution cursor to wait for the completion of other cursors with the given tag. Can optionally kill the tag while waiting.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Apply the same tag we're waiting on to the resulting cursor upon wait completion. Can be used to wait on our result cursor with the same tag.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: When we start waiting, how should we handle existing cursors?

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Starts a sound event on a speaker, and waits for its completion. Keywords: Voice Over, Choreo

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Play the specified animation sequence on a NON-ANIMGRAPH entity, and wait for it to complete.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Generate a random float between min and max (inclusive)

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Effect to actually fire into the world from this weapon

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Which 'column' to display this weapon in the HUD

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Default team (non Terrorist or Counter-Terrorist) 'row' to display this weapon in the HUD.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Amount of damage done on the first drowning tick (+1 each subsequent interval)

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Max damage done by a drowning tick

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Time to move between crouch and stand

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: While active, manage child cursors based on the results of a boolean condition. When the observable result changes, the prior cursor will be canceled and the appropriate outflow will fire a new child cursor. Will monitor continuously until externally canceled.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Condition to evaluate when any of its dependent values change.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Fired immediately when this node begins for chaining purposes.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Fired when the observable boolean is true, and killed when false.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Fired when the observable boolean is false, and killed when true.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Model used on the ground or held by an entity

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Model used on the ground or held by an entity

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Model used by the tools only to populate comboboxes for things like animgraph parameter pickers

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Was the weapon was built right-handed?

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Allows flipping the model, regardless of whether it is built left or right handed

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Effect Config for Muzzle Flash - if set, will use this config specified in the particle effect, using whatever CP configuration is specified there, vdata muzzleflash attachment will be ignored

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Barrel smoke after firing this weapon

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Barrel smoke shot threshold to create smoke

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Barrel smoke decrement rate when not firing

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Should both primary and secondary attacks be cooled down together (so cooling down primary attack would cooldown both primary + secondary attacks)?

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: This value used to determine this weapon's importance in autoselection

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Whether this weapon is safe to automatically switch to (should be false for eg. explosives that can the player may accidentally hurt themselves with)

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: How many bullets this gun can fire before it reloads (0 if no clip)

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: How many secondary bullets this gun can fire before it reloads (0 if no clip)

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Primary Initial Clip (-1 means use clip size)

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Secondary Initial Clip (-1 means use clip size)

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Indicates whether to treat reserve ammo as clips (reloads) instead of raw bullets

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Regardless of ammo position, we'll always use clip1 as where our bullets come from

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Indicates whether to keep any loaded ammo in the weapon on reload

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Which 'column' to display this weapon in the HUD

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Which 'row' to display this weapon in the HUD

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Skip this node after the limit. Check Type does not apply, the limit will always be checked.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Library for interacting with pulse cursors.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Causes each execution cursor to wait for the completion of all prior cursors that have visited this node. Use this to safely support multiple triggers to areas of the graph that take time to complete.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Any cursors above this count will wait, up to the limit.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Causes each execution cursor to pause at this node for a fixed period of time. Each cursor will wake up and resume execution when the time expires, unless aborted or early-woken.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Whether this explosion relates to fire

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Whether this explosion has explosive forces

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Decal to use when this explosion occurs

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Any extra waiting cursors will be terminated. -1 for infinite cursors.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Starts a sound event, returns a handle that can be used to stop it. Keywords: create, sound, event, audio

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Creates new cursors for when an animgraph tag is handled. Will listen until canceled.

metadata.name: MPropertyDescription
metadata.value: Evaluate the requirements of each connected node
